seoTitle: Joes Box vs Jolly Nose — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Joes Box and Jolly Nose. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Joes Box vs Jolly Nose: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Joes Box and Jolly Nose.
heading: Joes Box vs Jolly Nose — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Joes Box, New South Wales and Jolly Nose, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Joes Box has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Jolly Nose (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Joes Box or Jolly Nose safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Joes Box has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Jolly Nose scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Joes Box scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Jolly Nose scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Joes Box or Jolly Nose?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Joes Box has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
